title: tied
description: Experience a unique game mode where players are leashed together! Movement of one player pulls the leashed partner closer, ensuring they stay within 3 blocks. Watch a dynamic particle trail visualize the connection. Commands to start and stop the game.
body:
Plugin Name: Chained Together

Description:

Chained Together is a unique Minecraft plugin that introduces a captivating game mode where players are leashed to each other. When a player moves, their leash partner is automatically pulled closer until they are within a 3-block distance. This dynamic interaction creates an engaging and interactive gameplay experience.

Key Features:

Leash Mechanic: Players are connected in a chain. Movement of one player pulls their partner closer, maintaining a maximum distance of 3 blocks.
Visual Effect: A particle trail visually connects the players, moving from one to the other at a height of 0.5 blocks, enhancing the leash effect.
Commands:
/leash: Start the game mode and initiate the leash mechanics.
/unleash: Stop the game mode and remove all leashes.
Usage:

Use /leash to start the game, connecting all online players in a chain.
Move around to see the leash mechanics in action, with the particle trail displaying the connection.
Use /unleash to end the game and disconnect all players.
Important Notes:

Ensure all players are within the same world to experience the leash mechanics.
The plugin does not allow for leashing entities or items, only players.
Requirements:

Paper API version 1.21-R0.1-SNAPSHOT or compatible.
For any issues or feedback, please contact us at marvexhelp@gmail.com
